name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-37
title: SKILL.md B/B mode reads bug.json but backlog items use item.json
description: rabbit-feature-touch SKILL.md Step 1 B/B mode: FEATURE=$(jq -r .related_feature "<bug-or-item-dir>/bug.json"). For backlog items the file is item.json, not bug.json. The same hard-coded path will fail for backlog mode. Either branch on type to select bug.json vs item.json, or read both (try bug.json then item.json fallback). Currently backlog B/B invocations will fail at scope resolution.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 3: BUG-16 flat deprecation_criterion key; BUG-17 test/run.py; BUG-37 item.json in SKILL.md B/B mode.
